purpose: Golden prompts for checking whether this repository's skill descriptions have clear trigger boundaries. These cases are not a full model trace; they define the expected trigger contract for classifier, sub-agent, or platform-trace evals.

cases.prompt: I found an open-source agent skill on GitHub. Help me decide whether to import it as-is, adapt it, or clean-room rewrite it with attribution.
cases.notes: External skill adoption with provenance and license decisions.

cases.prompt: Audit this community skill before I fork it into my personal skills library. I need license, provenance, and attribution guidance.
cases.notes: Fork/import workflow should trigger adoption discipline.

cases.prompt: Create a brand new skill from my own workflow notes and add it to this repo.
cases.notes: Internal creation is not external adoption.

cases.prompt: During this migration, wrap the old sanitizer service behind a compatibility adapter and keep the fallback path alive.
cases.notes: Legacy service adapter and fallback lane.

cases.prompt: The new code imports the legacy templates before they are built. Design a build-before-import bridge without rewriting the old module.
Build a new stateless agent loop from scratch with terminal states and bounded turns.
Implement an agent loop inside a stateless request handler so each HTTP request advances one bounded step.
Fix this agent route so terminality, handoff states, and post-tool continuation are explicit instead of an unbounded while loop.
Add approval gates and deterministic stubs to the agent tool registry.
Convert this Markdown report into a polished printable PDF with a cover page, table of contents, code highlighting, and page numbers.
I have a .md file and need a presentable PDF version for sharing.
Rewrite this Markdown section to make the argument clearer, but do not export anything.
cases.notes: Editing Markdown text is not PDF conversion.

cases.prompt: Scan my past Codex sessions and turn recurring workflow friction into new or improved skills.
cases.notes: Mine local sessions for skill opportunities.

cases.prompt: Use the transcript history to decide what belongs in memory versus a reusable skill.
Import this public skill repository and preserve license attribution.
cases.notes: External adoption, not mining own sessions.

cases.prompt: My PyTorch model's loss is not decreasing and accuracy is stuck. Check the training loop for train/eval mode, zero_grad, logits, and shape bugs.
Help me sanity-check this deep learning training code by overfitting one batch and checking gradients.
我的 PyTorch 训练 loss 不下降，acc 卡住了，帮我检查 train/eval、zero_grad、梯度和 logits 这些训练循环问题。
cases.notes: Chinese neural network training failure prompt.

cases.prompt: Set up an evaluator for agent turns and export golden failure cases.
Design the agent tool registry with risk-tiered approval gates and POJO-validated playbooks.
Add deterministic stubs for dangerous tools and define which actions require user approval.
Hide the OpenAI Agents SDK behind one import site and map runner output onto our step contract.
cases.notes: SDK runner boundary, not tool registry policy.

cases.prompt: For this Elsevier journal paper, derive a figure-count and palette budget from references, then draw architecture and Ours-vs-baseline plots.
Generate the 600 dpi result stitch and efficiency plot for our manuscript using the shared matplotlib figure kit.
cases.notes: Drawing paper figures, not submission packaging.

cases.prompt: Rewrite this Figure 3 caption and verify the text-table linkage.
cases.notes: Paper review/editing, not drawing a new figure.

cases.prompt: Before changing this docs-backed codebase's package boundaries and runtime lanes, update the governing design spec.
We are changing agent-loop vocabulary and memory semantics. Make the docs change first, then code.
Fix this typo in a README and run the existing validation script.
cases.notes: Small doc typo is not a governing spec decision.

cases.prompt: Package this finished LaTeX manuscript for Elsevier Editorial Manager with CRediT, declarations, cover letter, and flat source zip.
Prepare the revised Elsevier submission packet and check abstract, highlights, graphical abstract, and data availability limits.
帮我把这篇 Elsevier 论文修回稿打包成 Editorial Manager 可提交的材料，包括声明、cover letter 和源码 zip。
Review the LaTeX introduction for AI-tone and logical self-consistency.
Migrate agent session state, memory snapshots, and trace rows from JSON files into SQLite with a fallback path.
Add structured trace persistence for eval and debug fields without putting evidence into long-term memory.
Export golden cases from low-scoring agent turns and set score thresholds.
Publish the notes under /Users/edward/Documents/intern/docs/notes as a MkDocs site and verify GitHub Pages.
Verify the ImWenyaoT/notes GitHub Pages artifact after converting the agent paper reading notes to MkDocs.
Set up a generic MkDocs site for a new open-source project.
cases.notes: Generic MkDocs should not trigger the personal notes workflow.

cases.prompt: Explain how GitHub Pages deployment works for a generic documentation website.
cases.notes: Generic Pages explanation should not trigger the personal notes workflow.

cases.prompt: Publish my reading notes as a MkDocs site and verify GitHub Pages.
cases.notes: Generic reading notes are not the personal intern notes site.

cases.prompt: 把 /Users/edward/Documents/intern/docs/notes 里的 agent 读论文笔记发布到 ImWenyaoT/notes，并验证 GitHub Pages artifact。
cases.notes: Chinese prompt with the personal notes path and repo.

cases.prompt: Polish this NeurIPS rebuttal paragraph and remove AI-sounding phrasing without changing the technical claims.
Check this paper's experiment narrative, Figure/Table captions, and evidence-bound conclusions for logical consistency.
帮我润色这段 NeurIPS 论文 LaTeX，去掉 AI 味，但不要改变技术主张。
检查这篇论文的实验叙事、图表 caption 和结论是否证据自洽。
cases.notes: Chinese paper narrative and caption review prompt.

cases.prompt: Make this business email sound more natural in English.
cases.notes: General English editing is not academic paper review.

cases.prompt: Before we call this implementation done, run an independent read-only adversarial review for blockers and weak evidence.
Is this actually done? Have a separate reviewer attack the scope and correctness claims.
Implement the requested feature and run the normal unit tests.
cases.notes: Normal implementation should not automatically trigger adversarial review.

cases.prompt: Summarize what changed and list the tests that passed.
cases.notes: Routine completion summary should not trigger an adversarial sub-agent.

cases.prompt: Build an async fire-and-forget evaluator that scores agent turns after the user-facing response and exports golden failures.
Add score thresholds, failure-case lifecycle, and regression harness reviews for agent responses.
Debug why this neural network training run has exploding gradients.
cases.notes: ML training eval is not agent turn scoring.

cases.prompt: Integrate the OpenAI Agents SDK behind a single import site with feature-flag opt-in and bounded runner turns.
Add multi-provider agent runner config and map the SDK output onto our loop step contract.
Define which tool calls require approval and which are safe deterministic stubs.
cases.notes: Tool policy, not vendor SDK wiring.

cases.prompt: Rewrite this technical resume bullet into a quantified results-first statement with stronger action verbs.
Tailor my engineering resume to this JD, cut it to one page, and improve the skills and self-evaluation sections.
帮我把这条技术简历经历改成量化成果导向的 bullet，并按这个后端开发 JD 调整。
Write an Elsevier cover letter for a manuscript submission.
cases.notes: Academic submission cover letter, not resume.
